text.title: api-documentation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for api-documentation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: No examples in the OpenAPI spec — only schema definitions.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Schemas describe shape; examples demonstrate real values. Without examples, Swagger UI generates synthetic data that may not reflect valid inputs.

failure-mode.description: Examples that are not tested against the actual API.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Untested examples drift from implementation. A consumer who follows the example and gets an error loses trust in all docs.
